title: Pons
body_html:
The pons contains the following cranial nerve nuclei:
  • Trigeminal (V)
  • Abducens (VI)
  • Facial (VII)
  • Vestibulocochlear (VIII)

Anatomy
Head & neck
The pons contains the following cranial nerve nuclei:
  • Trigeminal (V)
  • Abducens (VI)
  • Facial (VII)
  • Vestibulocochlear (VIII)
